narrative:
Precinct Ashtabula 5-A (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 315 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.8 percentage points.
